x-enumeration-literals.name: Survey Participant
x-enumeration-literals.description: The primary respondents who provide the data through their answers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Survey Designer
x-enumeration-literals.description: This party is responsible for creating the survey.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Survey Administrator
